svg.text: Option B — interior stair · bedroom toward the yard
Same core (stair/bath/laundry north) · bedroom east with morning light · kitchen on the west wall with an alley-side sink window
north ↑ · property line 3' — keep this wall (nearly) window-free
south · shed 4' away · best all-day sun
east · yard & main house · morning sun
LEVEL 2 — apartment · 480 sf gross / 437 sf net
north ↑ · property line 3' — keep this wall (nearly) window-free
south · shed 4' away · best all-day sun
east · yard & main house · morning sun
• PRO: bedroom gets morning (E) light, is NOT over the overhead door, and the 9' wardrobe band buffers it from stair noise.
• PRO: kitchen sink gets a real window (west/alley); big storage (wardrobe + bath W/D).
• CON: living room loses the yard view — south windows only — and afternoon-west sun hits the kitchen, not the sofa.
• CON: groceries cross the whole living room from the stair; dining is darker at breakfast.
